reason: API drift fix (post-#5669): chain/runtime moved PreviousRealm to chain/runtime/unsafe; banker.NewBanker(BankerTypeReadonly) split into banker.NewReadonlyBanker(). Mirrors the migration the official examples/gno.land/r/gnoland/boards2/v1 already did.
